_schema: Ending titles for the report card - the run's verdict, derived from DEPENDABILITY, not dollars. First matching rule wins; last entry is the fallback. Conditions: if_flag, if_not_flag, if_county_at_least, if_county_below, if_cash_at_least, if_contracts_at_least. Titles are scratch placeholders awaiting Director wording (law 6). Blanks T1-T5.

endings.title: [BLANK T1 — the ending for a player whose handshakes bounced: the county stopped calling. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK T2 — the ending for the player people stopped checking on: delivered, showed up, word held. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK T3 — money in the bank, nobody waves: successful and alone. The resentment thread's first appearance. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK T4 — no money, all trust: the county carries you into next season. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK T5 — the fallback: survived, nothing proven yet either way. Awaiting Director.]
